name: doom-cheats
description: DOOM cheat codes for Claude Code. Classic cheats (IDDQD, IDKFA, IDDT, IDCLIP, IDCLEV, IDMYPOS, IDBEHOLD) mapped to real, teeth-having dev workflow modes - not gimmicks: god-mode wraps risky work in a real restore point + hard verify, idkfa actually surveys tools/memory, iddt runs recon subagents, etc.
